_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted ZTool runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.0-alfa/ZTool-1.1.0-alfa-Setup.exe, setup sha256 b3c69f3caf06d7125f7fe340774526143fe293a40ea27f8fcb4ccb6d7fcc1501. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
